name: EdwBhiMbrCobStep5Ds

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_main AS (SELECT B.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, B.MBR_EFF_DT_SK, B.MBR_TERM_DT_SK, B.MBR_COB_TYP_CD, B.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, B.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK, B.BEG_EFF_DT_SK, B.BEG_TERM_DT_SK, B.MID_EFF_DT_SK, B.MID_TERM_DT_SK, NULL AS END_EFF_DT_SK, NULL AS END_TERM_DT_SK, NULL AS UPDT_IN FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_COB_SPLT A, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_COB_SPLT B WHERE A.MBR_UNIQ_KEY = B.MBR_UNIQ_KEY AND B.END_EFF_DT_SK = A.MID_EFF_DT_SK) SELECT MBR_UNIQ_KEY, MBR_EFF_DT_SK, MBR_TERM_DT_SK, MBR_COB_TYP_CD, MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK, BEG_EFF_DT_SK, BEG_TERM_DT_SK, MID_EFF_DT_SK, MID_TERM_DT_SK, END_EFF_DT_SK, END_TERM_DT_SK, UPDT_IN FROM cte_main
